channel.title: Workplace on Zoho Suites
channel.description: Recent content in Workplace on Zoho Suites

item.title: Workdrive
item.description:
WorkDrive

Zoho WorkDrive is a secure team file management platform to store, share, and collaborate on documents, spreadsheets, and presentations.

Organize content with Team Folders, govern access with granular permissions, and track activity with detailed insights.

Key Features

  • Team Folders: Structure content by department or project with access controls.
  • Secure sharing: Public links with passwords, expiry, and download restrictions.
  • Office suite collaboration: Work together in Writer, Sheet, and Show in real time.
  • External collaboration: Share files with clients while retaining data controls.
  • Admin console and insights: Audit trails, storage metrics, and device management.

item.title: Mail
item.description:
Mail

Zoho Mail is a secure, ad-free email suite for businesses with custom domains, advanced admin controls, and integrated calendar, contacts, and tasks.

Collaborate with Streams, share drafts, and manage conversations efficiently with clean, modern apps across devices.

Key Features

  • Custom domain email: Professional mailboxes with aliases and group addresses.
  • Built-in productivity: Calendar, contacts, tasks, and notes tightly integrated.
  • Streams collaboration: Comment, tag, and share emails without forwards.
  • Security and admin: Spam protection, encryption, and detailed policies.
  • Cross-platform apps: Web, mobile, and desktop access with consistent UX.

item.title: Meeting
item.description:
Meeting

Zoho Meeting is secure online meeting and webinar software for scheduling, hosting, and recording sessions with teams and customers.

Share screens, manage participants with moderator controls, and engage audiences with polls, Q&A, and registrations.

Key Features

  • HD meetings and webinars: Host secure meetings with no downloads for attendees.
  • Screen sharing and recording: Present and record sessions to share later.
  • Moderator controls: Lock meetings, mute participants, and manage permissions.
  • Engagement tools: Polls, Q&A, hand raise, and registration workflows.
  • Integrations: Connect with Zoho apps and calendars for smooth scheduling.
